title: LNE Paladins & Priests Add On
description: Loot & Explore Add-On with Paladins & Priests (RPG-Series ) related Content, like new Structures, Weapons etc.
body:
![Holy Church](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ysICqMga/images/5a76b51c0571bdbc4749859de0a7deae9fbff1be.png)
## Loot & Explore x Paladins & Priests (RPG-Series) Add-On💎🛡️

[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archers-expansion)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu)
[![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee)
[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/LNE-Paladins-Add-On)

## 📂 Installation
### 🚨Required Mods
- [Paladins & Priests](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests) (RPG-Series)
- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)
- [More RPG Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-rpg-classes 'Title')

### 🤝Integrated Compatibility
- [Loot & Explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore) (Additional Paladin & Priest Equipment)

## 🕹️ Features
- Loot & Explore is only a optional Dependency, if you dont want the special Paladin & Priest Weapons and just want the class related structures, you dont have to install the L&E Mod, or you can disable the equipment in the config.

### ⚔️Equipment
- Special Claymores, Great Hammers, Maces, Shields & Holy Staves can be crafted with new Smithing Template Upgrades (Only if Loot & Explore is installed)
- Each weapon has their own unique passive ability🪄
![Special Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ysICqMga/images/410e57c5669bdfbe424066f75f58ab596f247d64.png)

### 🏚️Structures
- Find new Paladins & Priest related Structures while exploring!
- Loot the chests and get rewarded with equipment related to this RPG class
- You can rarely find Spell Books with bound spells in these structures
![Small Shrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ysICqMga/images/e900192335665a9a9e5f2bce166fe3f1269d29a9.png)

## 🎥Showcases

## 🧑‍🔧Roadmap
- More Paladins & Priest related Structures
- Paladin Themed Enemies
- New Spells/Spell Books for each class
- More Special Weapons

## 🙌Credits
- Deadelus - for creating the Paladins Mod and inspiring this Add-On
- [Pedravila](https://www.artstation.com/pedravila) - for creating the Great Hammer, Mace & Shield Models
- [Emil](https://emil.art/) for creating the cute Mod Icon's
- [Yung X.i / theehaze](https://www.curseforge.com/members/theehaze/projects) for building some of the structures

Feel free to use this Mod in your Modpack, Video etc. If you want to give feedback about the mod or report bugs, feel free to join my Discord Server! :)
